# dispose

**Instance Property**

Disposes of the current transaction.

## Declaration

```swift
IOReturn (*dispose)(void *self);
```

## Return Value

Returns an IOReturn code.

## Discussion

The transaction will have to be recreated, in order to perform any operations on the transaction.
title: dispose
